content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Soldier and Number Game". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/546/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains n integers a1, a2, ..., an.
content.outputFormat: The output should be a single integer, the maximum number of points that can be obtained.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: The problem can be solved using dynamic programming. We can create a 2D array dp where dp[i][j] represents the maximum points that can be obtained after considering the first i numbers and the current number is j.
